Follow steps below to request Relocation through MyJio App
1. Login to MyJio App with your JioFiber Account
2. Tap on “Menu” and Select “Profile and Other Settings”
3. In Service Setting section select “Relocate JioFiber”
4. Enter your Address by selecting “Add Manually”
5. Confirm Address and Tap on “Proceed”. If JioFiber services are available , App will prompt to upload document
6. Upload both sides of Proof of Identity and Proof of Address (Ensure the file format to be PDF and size to be less than 2 MB) and tap on “Proceed”
7. Select Preferred Appointment Date and Time of Engineer Visit
8. Tap on “Proceed” and tap on “Confirm” to submit Relocation Request
Click https://www.jio.com/dl/relocate_jiofiber?FC=fiber to initiate Relocation Request
